title: 主题海报版式设计
description: {"type": "promotional advertisement poster for a bottled green tea beverage", "product": {"type": "clear plastic PET bottle filled with yellow-green tea", "label": "white label with green typography, featuring the produc
prompt_raw: {"type": "promotional advertisement poster for a bottled green tea beverage", "product": {"type": "clear plastic PET bottle filled with yellow-green tea", "label": "white label with green typography, featuring the product name '{argument name=\"product name\" default=\"清風茶\"}', subtitle '緑茶 Seifucha', and vertical text '国産茶葉使用' and '香り豊か、後味さわやか'"}, "background": "bright, fresh, sunlit outdoor atmosphere with dynamic water splashes wrapping around the bottle and vibrant green tea leaves", "layout": {"sections": [{"title": "headline", "position": "top-left", "text": "{argument name=\"main headline\" default=\"新発売\"}", "style": "large red text with a gold underline and a small green leaf accent"}, {"title": "catchphrase", "position": "mid-left", "text": "{argument name=\"catchphrase\" default=\"毎日に、すっきり。\"}", "style": "dark green text"}, {"title": "features", "position": "lower-left", "count": 2, "labels": ["国産茶葉使用", "香り豊か、後味さわやか"], "style": "white pill-shaped banners with green leaf icons"}, {"title": "price_badge", "position": "top-right", "text": "今だけ!! 特別価格 {argument name=\"price\" default=\"128円\"} (税込)", "style": "red circular sticker with white and yellow text"}, {"title": "promo_banner", "position": "bottom-left", "text": "期間限定のお得価格!", "style": "angled red ribbon with yellow and white text"}, {"title": "footer", "position": "bottom-edge", "text": "{argument name=\"footer text\" default=\"全国のコンビニ・スーパーで発売中\"}", "style": "solid green horizontal bar with a white shopping cart icon"}]}}
prompt_preview: {"type": "promotional advertisement poster for a bottled green tea beverage", "product": {"type": "clear plastic PET bottle filled with yellow-green tea", "label": "white label with green typography, featuring the produc
prompt_display_cn:
案例「type」属于海报/封面。这是一张海报/封面类案例，重点在主视觉、标题、情绪、构图和传播冲击力。适合改成活动海报、电影海报、专辑封面、产品发布海报、小红书封面或宣传 KV。

原始提示词要点：这是一条结构化提示词，原文使用 JSON/参数协议描述画面。案例类型为“promotional advertisement 海报 for a bottled green tea beverage”，核心由 type, product, background, layout 等部分组成。展示层建议不要直接暴露原始 JSON，而应转译为中文说明与可填空模板，方便用户理解画面结构、替换主题、复用版式。
prompt_template_cn:
制作一张【主题】的【海报/封面类型】。

主视觉：
画面中心是【主视觉对象】，呈现【动作/状态/姿态】，具有强烈视觉吸引力。

标题文字：
主标题写【主标题】，副标题写【副标题】。文字位置为【文字位置】，字体风格为【字体风格】，要求清晰可读。

画面风格：
整体采用【视觉风格】，氛围为【情绪氛围】，主色调为【主色调】，光影为【光影效果】。

背景与元素：
背景包含【背景元素】，辅助元素包括【装饰元素/符号/纹理】，但不要抢夺主视觉。

构图要求：
采用【构图方式】，层次明确，适合远看抓眼、近看有细节。

输出要求：
画面比例为【画面比例】，适合用于【发布平台/使用场景】。
